name: Cato Networks
description: SASE platform providing SD-WAN and security services through a global cloud network

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to the Cato Management Application
2. Go to Administration > API Keys
3. Generate a new API key with read permissions
4. Copy your Account ID from Administration > Account Info
5. Enter both values below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your Cato Networks API key from the Cato Management Application

credentialFields.label: Account ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your Cato Networks Account ID (found in Administration > Account Info)

checks.name: Production Firewall
checks.description: Verify firewall policies and rules are properly configured for production environments

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verify security events monitoring and alerting configurations are in place
